title: COMPARATIVE ANALYSIS OF DENTAL PARAMETERS IN PREGNANT WOMEN WITH PREECLAMPSIA
author: S.Sh. Olimov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Analysis of endotoxemia and enzyme system parameters in blood plasma of patients with non-carious lesions of hard dental tissues associated with fatty hepatosis. Serum enzyme activity and quantitative indicators of bile acids in patients with fatty hepatosis. A 3-fold increase in serum bile acid levels was noted in patients with fatty hepatosis compared to a group of healthy people with intact periodontium.
steps_raw: Analysis of endotoxemia and enzyme system parameters in blood plasma of patients with non-carious lesions of hard dental tissues associated with fatty hepatosis. Serum enzyme activity and quantitative indicators of bile acids in patients with fatty hepatosis. A 3-fold increase in serum bile acid levels was noted in patients with fatty hepatosis compared to a group of healthy people with intact periodontium.
keywords: Hepatobiliary pathology, endothelial dysfunction, desquamated endothelial cells, intrahepatic cholestasis, bile acids, cholestasis, cholesterol.
